name: West Indies Pepper Pot Soup
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 pounds Short Rib of Beef, 3-inch pieces
1 1/2 pounds Stew Beef, cut into 2-inch cubes
Medium Sweet Potatoes -- peeled and cubed
recipeInstructions:
1. Clean and slice the green pepper.
2. Heat oil in a skillet and sauté onion, garlic, and scallions until tender.
3. Add the sliced green pepper and cook for an additional minute.
4. Set aside.
5. Brown salt pork and short rib pieces in a large kettle on all sides.
6. Add stew beef and brown on all sides.
7. Pour in water and slowly bring to a boil, skimming as necessary.
8. Add thyme, salt, and pepper; lower heat and simmer, covered, for 1 hour, removing any scum that rises to the top.
9. After 1 hour, add sautéed vegetables (onion mixture) and remaining ingredients to the kettle.
10. Continue to cook slowly, covered, for about 30 minutes until vegetables and meat are cooked.
11. Remove from heat and cool slightly.
12. Take out short ribs and discard any fat; cube the meat and return it to the kettle if needed.
13. Reheat if necessary.
14. Serves 8.
